pcaconnectorad.template.generalflagsv2.C: General flags for v2 template schema that defines if the template is for a machine or a user and if the template can be issued using autoenrollment.

pcaconnectorad.template.generalflagsv2.A.Description: Allows certificate issuance using autoenrollment. Set to TRUE to allow autoenrollment.

pcaconnectorad.template.generalflagsv2.M.Description: Defines if the template is for machines or users. Set to TRUE if the template is for machines. Set to FALSE if the template is for users.
